;redcode-94
;name Hybrid Warrior
;author AI Assistant
;strategy Scanner/Bomber hybrid with SPL/DAT bomb
;assert CORESIZE == 8000

scan     ADD #11, scanptr     ; Scan incrementally
scanptr  CMP.I  }scan, 0      ; Check if location is non-zero
         JMP scan              ; Continue scanning if zero
         MOV bomba, >scanptr   ; Drop SPL bomb
         MOV bombb, >scanptr   ; Drop DAT bomb
         JMP scan              ; Go back to scanning
bomba    SPL #0, <-20          ; Split process
bombb    DAT <-21, <-21        ; Kill process

         end scan

         JMP scan
         MOV bomba, >ptr
         MOV bombb, >ptr
         JMP scan

         JMP rep

;redcode-94
;name Paper
;author mzvince (Everything2)
;source https://everything2.com/title/corewars+replicator
;strategy Classic paper replicator - fast copying beats stone bombers
;assert CORESIZE == 8000

step    equ 2667    ; coprime step for full coverage

start   spl 1       ; split for more processes

loop    mov copy, *ptr
        add #1, ptr
        mov copy, @ptr
        add #step, ptr
        jmp loop

copy    spl 0, 0
ptr     dat step, step*2

        end startroot@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193277:/app#
